allow: Bash(NODE_OPTIONS="--use-system-ca" npm install @nestjs/jwt @nestjs/passport passport passport-jwt bcrypt @nestjs/swagger)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=sorted\(d['paths'].keys\(\)\); print\('\\n'.join\(p for p in paths if 'stage' in p.lower\(\) or 'standing' in p.lower\(\) or 'stats/players' in p\)\)")
